controlled_motion_instruction: Continuous figure-eight motion at a comfortable steady pace without lifting the mouse.

controlled_variables.target_frame_rate_policy: detected-active-refresh-per-frozen-environment; production value remains owned by P0-R4

supersession_reason: Pilot v1 exposed Unity default redundant mouse-event merging and was rejected because observed cadence was locked to the 144 Hz render rate.
approval: Project-owner approved A-H and device settings on 2026-07-15; instrumentation correction preserves those settings.
